data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no)as mem_name --ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no, '0' , 6 ) || ' หมู่ที่ '||pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no, '0' , 8 )||decode(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no, '0' , 9 ) ,'-','',' ถนน '|| pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no, '0' , 9 ) ) as address_1
,'ตำบล'||pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no, '0' , 11 ) ||' อำเภอ'||pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no, '0' , 12 )as address_2
, 'จังหวัด'||pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no, '0' , 13 )||' '|| pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no, '0' , 14 ) as address_3 ,'!book_date!' as book_date ,'!book_date2!' as book_date2 ,sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = to_date('30/09/2025','dd/mm/yyyy')
